title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at BEL Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Software Engineer at BEL Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
BEL Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Surat operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BEL Ventures Solutions:
BEL Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL Ventures Solutions!
